proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have higher mean pfs_months than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months on treatment_pembrolizumab=3.414 (n=25008) vs off=3.449 (n=24992); Welch t-test p=0.0811.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_sotorasib=3.641 (n=17544) vs off=3.319 (n=32456); Welch t-test p=5.62e-49.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_olaparib=3.414 (n=14999) vs off=3.439 (n=35001); Welch t-test p=0.256.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_osimertinib=3.434 (n=14976) vs off=3.431 (n=35024); Welch t-test p=0.87.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with sex_female=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with sex_female=0.
Patients with stage_iv=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with has_brain_mets=0.
Patients with egfr_mutation=1 have higher mean pfs_months than those with egfr_mutation=0.
Patients with kras_g12c=1 have higher mean pfs_months than those with kras_g12c=0.
Patients with alk_fusion=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with alk_fusion=0.
Patients with stk11_mutation=1 have higher mean pfs_months than those with stk11_mutation=0.
Patients with brca2_mutation=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with brca2_mutation=0.
Patients with tmb_high=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with tmb_high=0.
Patients with smoke_current=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with smoke_current=0.
Patients with smoke_never=1 have higher mean pfs_months than those with smoke_never=0.
Patients with histology_squamous=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with histology_squamous=0.
Patients with ecog_ge2=1 have lower mean pfs_months than those with ecog_ge2=0.
Patients with pdl1_high=1 have higher mean pfs_months than those with pdl1_high=0.

analyses.result_summary: pfs_months for histology_squamous=1: 2.813 (n=13901); =0: 3.670 (n=36099); diff=-0.857; p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is greater in patients with pdl1_high=1 (PD-L1 TPS>=0.5) than in those with pdl1_high=0.
The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is greater in tmb_high=1 patients than tmb_high=0.

analyses.result_summary: Stratified pembro effect: pdl1_high=1: diff=-0.070 (p=0.106, n=5342/5407); pdl1_high=0: diff=-0.025 (p=0.264). Interaction coef=-0.045, p=0.356.
Stratified pembro: tmb_high=1: diff=-0.048 (p=0.2); tmb_high=0: diff=-0.030 (p=0.203). Interaction p=0.685.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_sotorasib improves pfs_months specifically in kras_g12c=1 patients but not in kras_g12c=0 patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: kras_g12c=1: sotorasib effect=+2.552 (p=1.66e-202, n=2246 on, 4122 off); kras_g12c=0: effect=-0.005 (p=0.799). Interaction coef=+2.558, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_osimertinib improves pfs_months specifically in egfr_mutation=1 patients but not in egfr_mutation=0 patients.
treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months specifically in brca2_mutation=1 patients but not in brca2_mutation=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: brca2=1: olaparib effect=+0.010 (p=0.934, n=417/1102); brca2=0: effect=-0.026 (p=0.236). Interaction coef=+0.037, p=0.778.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is larger in alk_fusion=1 patients than in alk_fusion=0 (interaction).
The effect of treatment_sotorasib on pfs_months is smaller in alk_fusion=1 patients than in alk_fusion=0 (interaction).
The effect of treatment_olaparib on pfs_months is larger in alk_fusion=1 patients than in alk_fusion=0 (interaction).
The effect of treatment_osimertinib on pfs_months is larger in alk_fusion=1 patients than in alk_fusion=0 (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: alk_fusion=1: treatment_pembrolizumab effect=-0.023 (n=1186/1278); alk_fusion=0: -0.039. Interaction coef=+0.016, p=0.864.
alk_fusion=1: treatment_sotorasib effect=-0.143 (n=855/1609); alk_fusion=0: +0.345. Interaction coef=-0.488, p=4.13e-07.

alk_fusion=1: treatment_osimertinib effect=+0.231 (n=751/1713); alk_fusion=0: -0.007. Interaction coef=+0.238, p=0.0172.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is reduced (or reversed) in stk11_mutation=1 patients compared to stk11_mutation=0 patients.
The benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is smaller (or negative) in smoke_never=1 (never-smokers) patients than in former/current smokers.

analyses.result_summary: smoke_never=1: pembro effect=-0.008 (p=0.87, n=3740/3719); smoke_never=0: effect=-0.040 (p=0.0682). Interaction coef=+0.032, p=0.571.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among the screened modifiers, the strongest interaction with treatment_pembrolizumab is on weight_loss_high: pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months differs between weight_loss_high=1 and weight_loss_high=0.

analyses.code: screen interaction p-values for treatment_pembrolizumab × each candidate modifier.
analyses.result_summary: Top interaction modifiers: weight_loss_high: int=+0.126, p=0.00241; stage_iv: int=+0.108, p=0.00677; ecog_0: int=+0.090, p=0.0248; kras_g12c: int=-0.113, p=0.0565; egfr_mutation: int=+0.099, p=0.0964

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest interaction with treatment_sotorasib in the full cohort is on kras_g12c (interaction coef +2.558); sotorasib effect differs between kras_g12c=1 and =0.
Within kras_g12c=1 patients, sotorasib effect on pfs_months is further modified by sex_female (top interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Top interaction modifiers: kras_g12c: int=+2.558, p=0; sex_female: int=-0.562, p=5.3e-41; smoke_never: int=-0.361, p=6.35e-10; smoke_current: int=+0.272, p=1.72e-09; alk_fusion: int=-0.488, p=4.13e-07

analyses.code: within kras_g12c=1: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_sotorasib * f', data=sub).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest interaction with treatment_olaparib is on albumin_low: effect of olaparib differs between albumin_low=1 and =0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest interaction with treatment_osimertinib is on alk_fusion: effect of osimertinib differs between alk_fusion=1 and =0.

analyses.result_summary: Top: alk_fusion: int=+0.238, p=0.0172; brca2_mutation: int=-0.254, p=0.0496; stk11_mutation: int=+0.061, p=0.319; pdl1_high: int=-0.041, p=0.444; ecog_ge2: int=-0.041, p=0.494

proposed_hypotheses.text: In male, kras_g12c=1 patients (kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0), treatment_sotorasib increases pfs_months relative to no sotorasib.
In female, kras_g12c=1 patients (kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=1), treatment_sotorasib does NOT improve pfs_months (effect ≈ 0 or negative).
In kras_g12c=1 AND alk_fusion=0 patients, treatment_sotorasib improves pfs_months.
In kras_g12c=1 AND alk_fusion=1 patients, treatment_sotorasib does NOT improve pfs_months (alk fusion suppresses sotorasib benefit).
In kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 AND alk_fusion=0 AND brca2_mutation=0 patients, treatment_sotorasib substantially improves pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: In kras_g12c=1 & sex_female=0: sotorasib effect on pfs_months = +4.644 mo (p=0, n_on=1237, n_off=2271; mean on=7.88, off=3.23).
In kras_g12c=1 & sex_female=1: sotorasib effect on pfs_months = -0.012 mo (p=0.884, n_on=1009, n_off=1851).
In kras_g12c=1 & alk_fusion=0: sotorasib effect = +2.667 mo (p=2.55e-214, n=2159/3950).
In kras_g12c=1 & alk_fusion=1 (n=87/172): sotorasib effect = -0.349 mo (p=0.225).
Combined subgroup (n=1154/2112): sotorasib effect = +4.985 mo (p=0; mean on=8.23, off=3.25).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest 2-way subgroup for treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months is ecog_0=0 AND weight_loss_high=0 (effect -0.116 mo).

analyses.code: exhaustive 2-way subgroup t-tests for treatment_pembrolizumab effect
analyses.result_summary: Top 5 subgroups: ecog_0=0 & weight_loss_high=0: eff=-0.116, p=7.1e-05, n=10624/10494; egfr_mutation=0 & weight_loss_high=0: eff=-0.102, p=0.000143, n=14179/14127; kras_g12c=1 & stage_iv=0: eff=-0.458, p=0.000154, n=1134/1131; nlr_high=0 & weight_loss_high=0: eff=-0.098, p=0.00032, n=13417/13427; stage_iv=0 & weight_loss_high=0: eff=-0.144, p=0.000471, n=5689/5716

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest 2-way subgroup for treatment_olaparib effect is stage_iv=1 AND histology_squamous=1 (effect -0.139 mo).

analyses.result_summary: Top 5 subgroups: stage_iv=1 & histology_squamous=1: eff=-0.139, p=0.00214, n=2726/6349; ecog_ge2=1 & histology_squamous=1: eff=-0.226, p=0.00462, n=617/1481; ecog_0=0 & has_brain_mets=1: eff=-0.130, p=0.00612, n=2363/5735; stage_iv=1 & weight_loss_high=0: eff=-0.085, p=0.00703, n=6332/14782; histology_squamous=1 & nlr_high=1: eff=-0.252, p=0.00891, n=699/1705

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest 2-way subgroup for treatment_osimertinib effect is alk_fusion=1 AND weight_loss_high=0 (effect +0.358 mo).

analyses.result_summary: Top 5 subgroups: alk_fusion=1 & weight_loss_high=0: eff=+0.358, p=0.00347, n=475/1134; tmb_high=0 & brca2_mutation=1: eff=-0.404, p=0.00377, n=309/775; brca2_mutation=1 & stage_iv=1: eff=-0.378, p=0.00441, n=277/699; alk_fusion=1 & albumin_low=0: eff=+0.317, p=0.005, n=573/1260; alk_fusion=1 & brca2_mutation=0: eff=+0.254, p=0.00982, n=735/1667

proposed_hypotheses.text: In kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 AND alk_fusion=0 patients, treatment_sotorasib substantially increases pfs_months.
Within kras_g12c=1 male patients, alk_fusion=1 abolishes the sotorasib benefit (effect drops to ~0 or negative).
Within kras_g12c=1 male patients, brca2_mutation=1 attenuates or abolishes the sotorasib benefit.
In male kras_g12c=1 patients without alk_fusion and without brca2_mutation, treatment_sotorasib increases pfs_months by ~5 months.

analyses.result_summary: Combined kras+ M alk- (n=1191/2179): sotorasib effect = +4.832 mo (p=0; means 8.09 on, 3.26 off).
kras+ M alk+ (n=46/92): sotorasib effect = -0.285 mo (p=0.501).
kras+ M brca2+ (n=39/68): sotorasib effect = -0.068 mo (p=0.887).
Ideal sotorasib subgroup (n=1154/2112): sotorasib effect = +4.985 mo (p=0; means 8.23 vs 3.25).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest positive 3-way subgroup for treatment_pembrolizumab is pdl1_high=0 AND stage_iv=1 AND weight_loss_high=1, with effect +0.133 mo.

analyses.result_summary: Top positive: pdl1_high=0&stage_iv=1&weight_loss_high=1: eff=+0.133, p=0.00185, n=4424/4415; pdl1_high=0&ldh_high=1&weight_loss_high=1: eff=+0.145, p=0.00616, n=3424/3400; ecog_0=1&has_brain_mets=1&weight_loss_high=1: eff=+0.283, p=0.00731, n=784/804; pdl1_high=0&histology_squamous=0&weight_loss_high=1: eff=+0.116, p=0.00761, n=4985/4947; pdl1_high=0&egfr_mutation=0&weight_loss_high=1: eff=+0.104, p=0.00902, n=5957/5946

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest positive 3-way subgroup for treatment_olaparib is ecog_0=1 AND age_old=1 AND albumin_low=1, effect +0.307 mo.

analyses.result_summary: Top: ecog_0=1&age_old=1&albumin_low=1: eff=+0.307, p=0.00333, n=381/937; pdl1_high=0&stk11_mutation=1&age_old=1: eff=+0.252, p=0.00363, n=573/1317; sex_female=0&age_old=1&albumin_low=1: eff=+0.281, p=0.00407, n=619/1525; tmb_high=0&age_old=1&albumin_low=1: eff=+0.222, p=0.00438, n=829/1943; egfr_mutation=0&age_old=1&albumin_low=1: eff=+0.209, p=0.00476, n=960/2360

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest positive 3-way subgroup for treatment_osimertinib is alk_fusion=1 AND brca2_mutation=0 AND weight_loss_high=0, effect +0.386 mo.

analyses.result_summary: Top: alk_fusion=1&brca2_mutation=0&weight_loss_high=0: eff=+0.386, p=0.00183, n=464/1105; alk_fusion=1&brca2_mutation=0&albumin_low=0: eff=+0.348, p=0.00223, n=564/1227; alk_fusion=1&ecog_ge2=0&ldh_high=0: eff=+0.452, p=0.0028, n=320/752; pdl1_high=0&alk_fusion=1&weight_loss_high=0: eff=+0.406, p=0.00338, n=373/899; alk_fusion=1&albumin_low=0&weight_loss_high=0: eff=+0.414, p=0.00352, n=360/838

proposed_hypotheses.text: In kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=1 AND alk_fusion=0, treatment_sotorasib does NOT substantially improve pfs_months (sex restricts the responder population).
In egfr_mutation=0 AND alk_fusion=0 AND pdl1_high=1 patients (canonical pembrolizumab responders), treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months.
Patients with pdl1_tps>=0.6 derive a positive pfs_months benefit from treatment_pembrolizumab.
In egfr+ female (egfr+ female) patients, treatment_osimertinib improves pfs_months.
In egfr+ never-smoker (egfr+ never-smoker) patients, treatment_osimertinib improves pfs_months.
In egfr+ adeno (egfr+ adeno) patients, treatment_osimertinib improves pfs_months.
In egfr+ ecog_0 (egfr+ ecog_0) patients, treatment_osimertinib improves pfs_months.
In brca2+ female patients, treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months.
In brca2+ adeno patients, treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months.
In brca2+ ecog_0 patients, treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months.
In stk11+ egfr+ patients, treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: kras+ F alk- (n=968/1771): sotorasib effect = +0.002 mo (p=0.978).
egfr- alk- pdl1+ (n=4434/4513): pembrolizumab effect = -0.091 mo (p=0.0569).
pdl1_tps>=0.6 (n=2585/2580): pembrolizumab effect = -0.076 mo (p=0.22).
egfr+ female (n=903/2036): osimertinib effect = +0.086 mo (p=0.302).
egfr+ never-smoker (n=1153/2672): osimertinib effect = -0.009 mo (p=0.902).
egfr+ adeno (n=1706/3825): osimertinib effect = -0.045 mo (p=0.467).
egfr+ ecog_0 (n=691/1614): osimertinib effect = -0.036 mo (p=0.711).
brca2+ female (n=197/478): olaparib effect = +0.065 mo (p=0.723).
brca2+ adeno (n=313/828): olaparib effect = +0.053 mo (p=0.714).
brca2+ ecog_0 (n=134/423): olaparib effect = -0.137 mo (p=0.517).
stk11+ egfr+ (n=282/698): olaparib effect = +0.332 mo (p=0.0294).

proposed_hypotheses.text: A tree-based heterogeneity search on sotorasib identifies a leaf with the largest predicted PFS gain: kras_g12c>0.50 & sex_female<=0.50 & histology_squamous>0.50 & age_years>66.15.

analyses.code: T-learner with RandomForestRegressor; DecisionTreeRegressor(max_depth=4) on individual treatment effects.
analyses.result_summary: Top tree leaf predicted ITE=+5.247 mo (n=543); rule: kras_g12c>0.50 & sex_female<=0.50 & histology_squamous>0.50 & age_years>66.15.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL sotorasib subgroup hypothesis: treatment_sotorasib improves pfs_months specifically in patients with kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 (male) AND alk_fusion=0 AND brca2_mutation=0; outside this subgroup the effect is null. Direction: positive.

FINAL pembrolizumab hypothesis: in this cohort, treatment_pembrolizumab does NOT improve pfs_months overall; no clinically meaningful positive subgroup was found (incl. pdl1_high, tmb_high, never-smoker, ecog_0, kras_g12c, egfr-/alk-).
FINAL olaparib hypothesis: treatment_olaparib does NOT improve pfs_months overall; no clinically meaningful positive subgroup found, including brca2_mutation+, stk11+, or any 2/3-way combination.
FINAL osimertinib hypothesis: treatment_osimertinib does NOT improve pfs_months overall and does NOT improve pfs_months in egfr_mutation+ patients; no replicable positive subgroup was identified.

analyses.code: Final subgroup test for sotorasib responder population.
analyses.result_summary: kras_g12c=1 & sex_female=0 & alk_fusion=0 & brca2_mutation=0 (n=1154/2112): sotorasib effect = +4.985 mo (p=0; mean on=8.23, off=3.25).

analyses.code: Pembrolizumab whole-cohort + screen for positive subgroups.
analyses.result_summary: Whole cohort (n=25008/24992): pembrolizumab effect = -0.035 mo (p=0.0811). Exhaustive 2- and 3-way subgroup searches yielded no replicable positive subgroup with effect >= 0.2 mo at p<0.05.
Whole cohort (n=14999/35001): olaparib effect = -0.025 mo (p=0.256). Brca2+ subgroup also null. No positive subgroup of meaningful effect.
Whole cohort (n=14976/35024): osimertinib effect = +0.004 mo (p=0.87). EGFR+ subgroup also null. Only weak positive signal in alk_fusion+ subgroup (likely chance).
